fullDescription.text: The Content Security Policy fails to define one of the directives that has no fallback. Missing/excluding them is the same as allowing anything.

rules.name: CSP: Failure to Define Directive with No Fallback

solution.text: Ensure that your web server, application server, load balancer, etc. is properly configured to set the Content-Security-Policy header.

shortDescription.text: CSP: Failure to Define Directive with No Fallback

fullDescription.text: The application appears to be a modern web application. If you need to explore it automatically then the Ajax Spider may well be more effective than the standard one.

solution.text: This is an informational alert and so no changes are required.
